subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but He, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Behold then, O my God, Thy handmaiden who hath turned towards [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم فانظر یا الهی امتک التی توجهت الی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for women, @prayer for forgiveness
